creator: dkelly@nebula.tbe.com
text:
If one doesn't have mkisofs installed, cd-write says,
"I don't know where is "mkisofs" and MKISOFS is not set
in your environment"

Fix: 

cd /usr/ports/sysutils/mkisofs
make install

But dependency should be put in cd-write's Makefile
unless there is some reason one might want cd-write
but not need mkisofs. In that case it would be nice for
cd-write to say on exit of "make install" that one might
also like to install mkisofs.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/sysutils/cd-write
make install
